text:
Created attachment 250300
Aozora Bunko Text Viewer

Aozora Bunko Text Viewer.

Draw in vertical writing mode with FreeType.
Supports reading Shift-JIS/EUC-JP/UTF-8/UTF-16BE/UTF-16LE text.
Corresponds to general Aozora Bunko annotations.
You can read text files compressed in ZIP.
Images in the ZIP can also be displayed as illustrations.
A bookmark can be attached.
